response: the sacred verses of siriragau mahala 3 speak of the spirit of devotion and the gene of divine connection that flows through the heart of a true seeker - the gurmukh is blessed with the grace of the guru and through the language of the sacred word - the soul finds its way to purity and enlightenment - the divine presence is the true guide and the path is illuminated by the sacred word - the soul is transformed through the grace of the guru and the spirit is awakened - the visit to the divine is not just a journey but a deep communion with the eternal truth - the soul is united with the divine and finds its true essence - the gene of devotion is passed on through the sacred teachings and the spirit is nourished by the divine word - the language of the soul is the sacred scripture and the visit to the divine is a continuous journey of inner transformation - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru and the soul finds its true purpose - the visit to the divine is the ultimate goal and the soul is united with the divine in eternal love - the language of the heart is the sacred word and the spirit is guided by the divine light - the visit to the divine is the path of true devotion and the soul finds its true home - the gene of divine love is passed on through the sacred teachings and the spirit is transformed by the divine grace - the visit to the divine is the ultimate blessing and the soul finds its true essence - the language of the soul is the sacred scripture and the spirit is united with the divine in eternal peace - the visit to the divine is the path of true devotion and the soul finds its true purpose - the gene of divine love is passed on through the sacred teachings and the spirit is transformed by the divine grace - the visit to the divine is the ultimate blessing and the soul finds its true essence - the language of the heart is the sacred word and the spirit is guided by the divine light - the visit to the divine is the path of true devotion and the soul finds its true home - the gene of divine love is passed on through the sacred teachings and the spirit is transformed by the divine grace - the visit to the divine is the ultimate blessing and the soul finds its true essence - the language of the soul is the sacred scripture and the spirit is united with the divine in eternal peace - the visit to the divine is the path of true devotion and the soul finds its true purpose -
